CreateAppBlbHttpListener.listenerPort: Listening port of the listener, integer between 1-65535
CreateAppBlbHttpListener.scheduler: Load balancing algorithm, supports "RoundRobin" (weighted round robin) or "LeastConnection" (least connections)
CreateAppBlbHttpListener.keepSession: Whether to enable session persistence so requests from the same client reach the same backend server, disabled by default
CreateAppBlbHttpListener.keepSessionType: Cookie handling method for session persistence, valid only when session persistence is enabled, supports "insert" or "rewrite", default "insert"
CreateAppBlbHttpListener.keepSessionTimeout: Cookie expiration time for session persistence (in seconds), valid only when session persistence is enabled, default 3600s, integer between 1-15552000
CreateAppBlbHttpListener.keepSessionCookieName: Cookie name to override for session persistence, valid only when session persistence is enabled and keepSessionType="rewrite"
CreateAppBlbHttpListener.xForwardedFor: Whether to enable retrieval of the real client IP via the X-Forwarded-For HTTP header on backend servers, disabled by default
CreateAppBlbHttpListener.xForwardedProto: Whether to enable retrieval of the listening protocol via the X-Forwarded-Proto HTTP header on backend servers, disabled by default
CreateAppBlbHttpListener.additionalAttributes.gzipJson: Whether to enable gzip JSON compression, string type, value "on" or "off"
CreateAppBlbHttpListener.serverTimeout: Maximum backend server timeout (in seconds), default 30s, integer between 1-3600
CreateAppBlbHttpListener.redirectPort: Forwards requests received by this listener to an HTTPS listener specified by this port
